popularStory.description: Edward the Exile (1016 – 19 April 1057), also called Edward Ætheling, was the son of King Edmund Ironside and of Ealdgyth. He spent most of his life in exile in the Kingdom of Hungary following the de …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Ætheling the Exile於1016年1月出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Edmund Ironside King of England II27歲，母親Ealdgyth of Northumbria21歲。他和Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他於1016年住在匈牙利培斯特易哈利達馬達且於1038年住在匈牙利巴拉亞。他去世於1057年4月19日在英國米德萊可倫敦享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Ætheling the Exile于1016年1月出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Edmund Ironside King of England II27岁，母亲Ealdgyth of Northumbria21岁。他和Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna至少有1个儿子和2个女儿。他于1016年住在匈牙利培斯特易哈利達馬達且于1038年住在匈牙利巴拉亞。他去世于1057年4月19日在英国米德萊可倫敦享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Canut the Great
historicEvents.description: As Aethelred, King of England died, his son, Edmund Ironside devised a truce with Danish King Canute. The truce divided the kingdom between the two but Edmund died shortly after and became King of England. Several years later, he also became king of Denmark.

historicEvents.title: England Divided
historicEvents.description: King Canute died in 1035 and England was divided between his three sons. His son Sweyn received Norway, Harthacanute received Denmark, and Harold Harefoot received North England.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Ætheling the Exile was born in January 1016, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Edmund Ironside King of England II, was 27 and his mother, Ealdgyth of Northumbria, was 21. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna. He lived in Ipolydamásd, Pest, Hungary in 1016 and Baranya, Hungary in 1038. He died on 19 April 1057, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.St. Paul's Cathedral, London, England: St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Ætheling the Exile est né en janvier 1016, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edmund Ironside King of England II, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Ealdgyth of Northumbria, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna. Il a vécu à Ipolydamásd, Pest, Hongrie en 1016 et à Baranya, Hongrie en 1038. Il est décédé le 19 avril 1057, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterré à St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.St. Paul's Cathedral, London, England: St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Ætheling the Exile im Januar 1016 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edmund Ironside King of England II 27 und seine Mutter Ealdgyth of Northumbria 21. Er hatte mit Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. 1016 hat er in Ipolydamásd, Pest, Ungarn und 1038 in Baranya, Ungarn gelebt. Er starb am 19. April 1057 im Alter von 41 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England und wurde in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.St. Paul's Cathedral, London, England: St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Ætheling the Exile è nato il nel gennaio 1016 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Edmund Ironside King of England II, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Ealdgyth of Northumbria, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna. Vissuto a Ipolydamásd, Pest, Ungheria nel 1016 e nel Baranya, Ungheria nel 1038. Morì il 19 aprile 1057, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolto a St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Ætheling the Exileが1016年1月にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Edmund Ironside King of England IIは27歳，母Ealdgyth of Northumbriaは21歳であった。彼はAgatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavnaとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1016年にはハンガリーペストイプオリダムaスドに，1038年にはハンガリーバーアニーアに住んでいた。彼は1057年4月19日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト プアウル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Paul's Cathedral, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: Edward Ætheling the Exile(이)가 1016년 1월 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edmund Ironside King of England II(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Ealdgyth of Northumbria(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 1016년도에 헝가리 페스트 이포리다a즈드에서, 1038년도에 헝가리 버랜야에서 살았다. 그는 1057년 4월 19일 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Ætheling the Exile nasceu em janeiro de 1016, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edmund Ironside King of England II, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Ealdgyth of Northumbria, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna. Ele viveu em Ipolydamásd, Pest, Hungria em 1016 e em Baranya, Hungria em 1038. Ele faleceu em 19 de abril de 1057, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultado em St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St. Paul's Cathedral, London, England: ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Ætheling the Exile родился январь 1016 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Edmund Ironside King of England II было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Ealdgyth of Northumbria, 21. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna. Он жил в местности иполидамaсд, пест, Венгрия в 1016 году и в местности бараня, Венгрия в 1038 году. Он умер 19 апреля 1057 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 41 год и был похоронен в местности ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas con Agatha Von Brunswick Princess Of Hungary, Of Kiev Yaroslavna. Vivió en Ipolydamásd, Pest, Hungría en 1016 y en Baranya, Hungría en 1038. Murió el 19 de abril de 1057, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultado en St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
